description: Partial lab evidence: compare token-endpoint shape fields under matched grant+scopes. Lab uses resource-owner password grant (not the programme auth-code+PKCE baseline). Does NOT exercise refresh reuse or rotation — that belongs to P-REFRESH-REUSE-v0 when that spine is run. Pipeline: field extraction v0.

assertions.expected: HTTP 200, Bearer, refresh issued, id_token contains sub
JWT-ness of access token compared only after config equivalence for JWT access tokens
expires_in compared only after access-token lifetimes are equated
